project_title: The Intergenerational String Band & Heritage Map

key_archive_links.notes: Jerry at 20; pure old-timey folk and flat-picking.
The gold standard for Fiddle/Banjo/Bass/Mandolin quartet.

jerry_garcia_roots.heritage_connection: Jerry's deep study of the 'Old Masters' like Bill Monroe and Doc Watson.

key_archive_links.notes: Rev. Jeff Mosier teaching the band traditional stagecraft.
Burlington heritage; pedal steel and banjo mastery.

phish_roots.heritage_connection: Deconstructionist Bluegrass; high-speed precision meets vocal harmony.

key_archive_links.notes: Raw acoustic power; direct lineage to Doc Watson.
Heritage swing meets old-time fiddle; high senior/vintage appeal.

billy_strings_vanguard.heritage_connection: The 'Great Connector' bringing the 1920s sound to the 2020s.

clogging_indicators: Listen for rhythmic 'thumping' on wooden boards in field recordings.
Search metadata for 'Breakdown', 'Hoedown', or 'Square Dance with Calls'.
Look for 'John Hartford' covers—the patron saint of the clogging-fiddle-banjo intersection.

senior_facility_integration.biodiversity_overlay: Pair 'The Pink Beds' (NC) with Highwoods String Band for a full sensory mountain experience.
